Datasets.description: A list of datasets that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Jobs.description: A list of jobs that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Projects.description: A list of projects that are defined .

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Recipes.description: A list of recipes that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Rulesets.description: A list of RulesetItem. RulesetItem contains meta data of a ruleset.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Schedules.description: A list of schedules that are defined.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the dataset was created.

Format.description: The file format of a dataset that is created from an Amazon S3 file or folder.

FormatOptions.description: Represents a set of options that define the structure of either comma-separated value (CSV), Excel, or JSON input.

Input.description: Represents information on how DataBrew can find data, in either the Glue Data Catalog or Amazon S3.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the dataset was last modified.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the dataset.

Source.description: The location of the data for this dataset, Amazon S3 or the Glue Data Catalog.

PathOptions.description: A set of options that defines how DataBrew interprets an Amazon S3 path of the dataset.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the job was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user associated with the creation of the job.

DatasetName.description: The dataset that the job acts upon.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an encryption key that is used to protect the job.

EncryptionMode.description:
The encryption mode for the job, which can be one of the following:

  • SSE-KMS - Server-side encryption with keys managed by KMS.

  • SSE-S3 - Server-side encryption with keys managed by Amazon S3.

Type.description:
The job type, which must be one of the following:

  • PROFILE - The job analyzes the dataset to determine its size, data types, data distribution, and more.

  • RECIPE - The job applies one or more transformations to a dataset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the job.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the job was last modified.

LogSubscription.description: Indicates whether Amazon CloudWatch logging is enabled for this job.

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum number of compute nodes that DataBrew can consume when the job processes data.

MaxRetries.description: The maximum number of times to retry the job after a job run fails.

Outputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the output from running the job.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

ProjectName.description: The DataBrew project associated with this job.

ProfileConfiguration.description: Configuration for profile jobs. Used to select columns, do evaluations, and override default parameters of evaluations. When configuration is null, the profile job will run with default settings.

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job.

RecipeReference.description: Represents the name and version of a DataBrew recipe.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the job.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the Identity and Access Management (IAM) role to be assumed when DataBrew runs the job.

Timeout.description: The job's timeout in minutes. A job that attempts to run longer than this timeout period ends with a status of TIMEOUT.

JobSample.description: Sample configuration for profile jobs only. Determines the number of rows on which the profile job will be executed.

Attempt.description: The number of times that DataBrew has attempted to run the job.

CompletedOn.description: The date and time when the job completed processing.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset for the job to process.

ErrorMessage.description: A message indicating an error (if any) that was encountered when the job ran.

ExecutionTime.description: The amount of time, in seconds, during which the job run consumed resources.

JobName.description: The name of the job being processed during this run.

ProfileConfiguration.description: Configuration for profile jobs. Used to select columns, do evaluations, and override default parameters of evaluations. When configuration is null, the profile job will run with default settings.

ValidationConfigurations.description: List of validation configurations that are applied to the profile job.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the job run.

State.description: The current state of the job run entity itself.

LogSubscription.description: The current status of Amazon CloudWatch logging for the job run.

LogGroupName.description: The name of an Amazon CloudWatch log group, where the job writes diagnostic messages when it runs.

Outputs.description: One or more output artifacts from a job run.

DataCatalogOutputs.description: One or more artifacts that represent the Glue Data Catalog output from running the job.

DatabaseOutputs.description: Represents a list of JDBC database output objects which defines the output destination for a DataBrew recipe job to write into.

RecipeReference.description: Represents the name and version of a DataBrew recipe.

StartedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who started the job run.

StartedOn.description: The date and time when the job run began.

JobSample.description: Sample configuration for profile jobs only. Determines the number of rows on which the profile job will be executed. If a JobSample value is not provided, the default value will be used. The default value is CUSTOM_ROWS for the mode parameter and 20000 for the size parameter.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the project was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the project.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the project was last modified.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the project.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the project.

Sample.description: Represents the sample size and sampling type for DataBrew to use for interactive data analysis.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the Identity and Access Management (IAM) role to be assumed when DataBrew runs the job.

SessionStatus.description:
Describes the current state of the session:

  • PROVISIONING - allocating resources for the session.

  • INITIALIZING - getting the session ready for first use.

  • ASSIGNED - the session is ready for use.

OpenedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user that opened the project for use.

OpenDate.description: The date and time when the project was opened.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the recipe.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was created.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the recipe.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the recipe was last modified.

ProjectName.description: The name of the project associated with this recipe.

PublishedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last published the recipe.

PublishedDate.description: The date and time when the recipe was last published.

Steps.description: One or more steps to be performed by the recipe. Each step consists of an action, and the conditions under which the action should succeed.

TargetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a resource (dataset) that the ruleset is associated with.

Rules.description: A list of rules that are defined with the ruleset. A rule includes one or more checks to be validated on a DataBrew dataset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the ruleset was created.

CreatedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who created the ruleset.

LastModifiedBy.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the user who last modified the ruleset.

LastModifiedDate.description: The modification date and time of the ruleset.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the ruleset.

Tags.description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the ruleset.

CreateDate.description: The date and time that the schedule was created.

CreatedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who created the schedule.

JobNames.description: The name or names of one or more jobs to be run by using the schedule.

LastModifiedBy.description: The identifier (user name) of the user who last modified the schedule.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time that the schedule was last modified.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schedule.

CronExpression.description: The date or dates and time or times when the jobs are to be run for the schedule. For more information, see Cron expressions in the Glue DataBrew Developer Guide.

JobRuns.description: A list of job runs that have occurred for the specified job.

NextToken.description: A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.
A token that you can use in a subsequent call to retrieve the next set of results.

Recipes.description: A list of versions for the specified recipe.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the DataBrew resource.
